# Ansul / Johnson Controls — Fire Suppression for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Sapphire System with Novec 1230 (FK-5-1-12)
- Clean agent fire suppression — electrically non-conductive, zero residue, zero ODP
- Design concentration: 4.2-5.3% by volume
- Discharge time: 10 seconds or less (NFPA 2001)
- Storage: 360 psi or 500 psi nitrogen-superpressurized
- Cylinder sizes: 70, 130, 180, 260, 400, 600, 793 lb
- Listed: UL, ULC, FM Approved, CE

## 40-ft Container Sizing
- Agent required: 280-320 lbs Novec 1230
- Config: 2x 180-lb cylinders OR 1x 400-lb cylinder
- Nozzles: 3 ceiling-mount, spaced 12-15 ft apart (ANSUL Model A/C 360-degree)
- Hold time: 10 min minimum (sealed container achieves easily)
- Requires auto-close ventilation dampers on activation

## Integration
- VESDA Fire 1 alarm -> ANSUL AUTOPULSE panel -> cross-zone verify -> 30-sec countdown -> damper close -> Novec discharge
- Total sequence: under 15 seconds from detection to full discharge

## Pricing: $25,000-$45,000 installed (agent + cylinders + piping + panel + detectors)
## Agent refill: ~$35-45/lb

## Made in: Marinette, Wisconsin (AMERICAN)
